name: Blackberry Cobbler #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix blackberries, sugar, flour, water, and lemon juice until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a baking dish lined with pastry dough.
4. Sprinkle butter over the top of the cobbler filling.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
6. Serve warm with whipped cream and sugar on the side.
